Column ii
o ii 1o ii 1

TA 6 UŠ a-na ŠAR₂ TA ⸢5(BAN₂)⸣ [a-na ...]

From 6 cables to a šar; from 5 sūtu (?) [to ...]

o ii 22

LU₂ ša u₄-mu ša₂ ina ŠA₃ ZU?-šu₂ DU₃u₂ 1/2 ŠE ŠU₂u₂

A man who works, whose days that the middle ...

they set (?) by 1/2 grain3

o ii 33

i-na 2i u₄-mu

ŠE ŠU₂u₂

on the 2nd day

they set by a grain

o ii 44

i-na šal-šu₂ u₄-mu ŠE 1/2 ŠE ŠU₂u₂ ina 4i u₄-mu 2 ŠE ŠU₂u₂

on the third day they set by a grain and 1/2 grain

on the 4th day they set by 2 grains

o ii 55

i-na 5šu₂ u₄-mu 2 1/2 ŠE ŠU₂u₂ ina 6!(5)šu₂ u₄-mu 3 ŠE ŠU₂u₂

on the 5th day they set by 2 1/2 grains

on the 6th day they set by 3 grains

o ii 66

i-na 7i u₄-mu 3 1/2 ŠE ŠU₂u₂ ina 8i u₄-mu 4 ŠE ŠU₂u₂

on the 7th day they set by 3 1/2 grains

on the 8th day they set by 4 grains

o ii 77

i-na 9i u₄-mu 4 1/2 ŠE ŠU₂u₂ ina 10i u₄-mu 5 ŠE ŠU₂u₂

on the 9th day they set by 4 1/2 grains

on the 10 day they set by 5 grains

o ii 88

i-na ITI U₄-MEŠ 3 ŠU.SI ŠU₂u₂

In a month of days set by 3 fingers

o ii 99

i-na 10 ITI U₄-MEŠ 1 KUŠ₃ ŠU₂u₂

(colophon)
l.e. ii 33

SAG x [...]

...

[...]

l.e. ii 44

ki-i KA ṭup-pi [...]-MEŠ SAR.SAR-ma IGI.⸢DU₃⸣ [...]

According to an [old] tablet [...] written and inspected [...]

1 An error for 60 rods

2 An error for 60 rods

3 This table seems to be about the change in sunset times night by night (rabû = ŠÚ ) but the meaning of the first half of the line is unclear to me.

4 The meaning of this section is very unclear.
